name: Puli Meka
overview: A serial killer is targeting police officers in Hyderabad. A female cop in charge of the Special Investigation Team and a forensic expert race against time to find the culprit.

trailers.title: PULIMEKA (Telugu) | ZEE5 Original Series | Tralier | Aadi | Lavanya | Kona Venkat|Premeires 24th Feb
